name: Tenshin Reb Anderson
bio: Tenshin Reb Anderson is a senior dharma teacher at the San Francisco Zen Center. He received dharma transmission from Zentatsu Richard Baker and served as abbot of SFZC from 1986 to 1995. A student of Shunryu Suzuki Roshi from the age of 22, he is one of the most senior American Zen teachers. He is the author of 'Being Upright: Zen Meditation and the Bodhisattva Precepts' and 'The Third Turning of the Wheel.'
